CustomField.description: Viser ikon dersom svarfrist er passert
CustomField.formula: IF( TAG_Overdue__c, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 10, 10) +' ', '' ) & MID(TEXT(TAG_DueDate__c), 9, 2) + '.' + MID(TEXT(TAG_DueDate__c), 6, 2) + '.' + LEFT(TEXT(TAG_DueDate__c), 4)
CustomField.label: Due/Overdue
